creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
The crashes in UTPSocket::selective_ack should have been fixed by ports r377674. Other crashes require a backtrace for a fresh version, it was one of the motivations for PORTREVISION bump in ports r378806. Both transmission-* itself and all its dependencies should be rebuilt with debug symbols.

That forum thread has a mixture of Transmission versions making it harder to guess if they talk about one issue or many. For one, 2.82_1 crash could be an upstream bug fixed in 2.84.
